nasb.text: He who was delivered over because of our transgressions, and was raised because of our justification.

esv.text: who was delivered up for our trespasses and raised for our justification.

cnv.text: 耶穌為我們的過犯被交去處死，為我們的稱義而復活。

ccb.text: 耶稣受害而死是为了我们的过犯，祂复活是为了使我们成为义人。

csbs.text: 主耶稣被交出去，是为了我们的过犯；复活，是为了我们称义。
